title: Jessica Burket
text:
Faculty directory observation
Name: Jessica Burket
Snapshot: 2026-07-21

confidence.rationale: Proposed from an explicit normalized Knowledge Object field.
Proposed from an explicit normalized Knowledge Object field.
Proposed from an explicit normalized Knowledge Object field.

published_college: College of Natural and Behavioral Sciences

organizational_affiliations.label: College of Natural and Behavioral Sciences

education_entries: Ph D in Biomedical Sciences, Eastern Virginia Medical School
MS in Biomedical Sciences, Eastern Virginia Medial School
BS in Psychology, Saint Francis University
research_interests: My research interests include studying the neuropsychopharmacology and neurobiological mechanisms of psychiatric and neurodevelopmental disorders, such as schizophrenia and autism spectrum disorder.
teaching_interests: Principles of Biology I Neurobiology Senior Seminar in Neuroscience
publications: Journal Article, Academic Journal (2025). Moby Dick Supports an Ethological Model of Social Behavior, Socio-Cognition and Social Communication; Do von Economo-like Neurons Play a Role? . Clinical Neuropharmacology.

Journal Article, Academic Journal (2024). Translational Neuroscience Contributes to Understanding Neurodevelopmental Outcomes of Dostoyevsky’s “Brothers Karamazov” with Treatment Implications . Clinical Neuropharmacology.

Journal Article, Academic Journal (2023). From Mouse to Man: N-Methyl-d-Aspartic Acid Receptor Activation as a Promising Pharmacotherapeutic Strategy for Autism Spectrum Disorders . Medical Clinics of North America. Volume, 107. Issue, 1. Pages, 101-117.

Journal Article, Academic Journal (2022). Targeted NMDA Receptor Interventions for Autism: Developmentally Determined Expression of GluN2B and GluN2A-Containing Receptors and Balanced Allosteric Modulatory Approaches . Biomolecules. Volume, 12. Issue, 2. Pages, 181.

Journal Article, Academic Journal (2021). Disrupted copper homeostasis: Pathogenic factor in autism spectrum disorder and side effect of valproic acid . Personalized Medicine in Psychiatry. Volume, 29-30. Pages, 100087.

Journal Article, Academic Journal (2021). Perineuronal Nets and Metal Cation Concentrations in the Microenvironments of Fast-Spiking, Parvalbumin-Expressing GABAergic Interneurons: Relevance to Neurodevelopment and Neurodevelopmental Disorders . Biomolecules. Volume, 11. Issue, 8. Pages, 1235.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2021). Exposure to Low (≤10 cGy) Doses of 4He Particles Leads to Increased Social Withdrawal and Loss of Executive Function Performance. . Radiation research.

Case Study, Academic Journal or Book (2021). A DeNovo Missense Variant of SCN2A; Implications and Limitations for Understanding Clinical Phenotype and Treatment Recommendations . Clinical Neuropharmacology.

Journal Article, Academic Journal (2021). Psychotropic medication use for adults and older adults with intellectual disability; selective review, recommendations and future directions . Prog Neuropsychopharmacol Biol Psychiatry. Volume, 104.

Book, Chapter in Scholarly Book-New (2020). An Evolving Therapeutic Rationale for Targeting the α7 Nicotinic Acetylcholine Receptor in Autism Spectrum Disorder . Springer, Cham. Volume, 45. Pages, 167-208.

Journal Article, Academic Journal (2015). The α7 nicotinic acetylcholine receptor: A mediator of pathogenesis and therapeutic target in autism spectrum disorders and Down syndrome . Biochemical Pharmacology. Volume, 97. Issue, 4. Pages, 363-377.
awards_honors: Excellence in Undergraduate Research Mentorship, Christopher Newport University. (2025)

Presentations: Jessica Burket, Virginia Drug Discovery Rx, "“Mechanisms Underlying Potential Treatment Strategies in Neurodevelopmental Disorders”," Newport News, VA. (2025)

Jessica Burket, Tulane Brain Institute Seminar Series, "Examining NMDA Receptor Activation in Mouse Models related to Neurodevelopmental Disorders at a Small Liberal Arts University," New Orleans. (2024)

Shane Potters, Benjamin Goodman, Colleen Neff, Lily Kowalski, Abigail Bunting, Scott Burden, Nicholas Truver, Austin Thompson, Shania Smaw, Daniel Calvano, Jordan Sanchez, Darlene Mitrano, James Bogenpohl, Jessica Burket, Society for Neuroscience, "Examining behavioral and molecular effects after sub-chronic administration of an NMDA receptor partial agonist in a 22q11.2," Washington, DC. (2023)

Aidan Rucker, Sarah Jones, Stephen Deutsch, Jessica Burket, Society for Neuroscience, "Transcriptomic profiling and bioinformatic analysis reveals modulation of mTOR-associated genes following glycine type 1 tran," Chicago, IL. (2021)
Grants and Sponsored Research: Jessica Burket, "Role of the NLRP3 Inflammasome in Mediating Microglial Activation and Development of Neuropsychiatric Symptoms Induced by HIV," Sponsored by NIH- National Institute on Drug Abuse (NIDA)
Jessica Burket, "Behavioral and Molecular Characterization of Adolescent Df(h22q11)/+ Mice," Sponsored by Taconic Biosciences
